title: O'Reilly Automotive: Reiterating Our Bullish View On This Share Buyback Machine
text: Since we initiated coverage on O'Reilly Automotive back in April 2022, the stock has outperformed the S&P 500 by a considerable margin. In an uncertain macro environment, ORLY's constant cash flow profile, fair multiple and below-target leverage ratio should continue to provide support well into 2023.

title: Gabelli Funds to Host 46th Annual Auto Symposium October 31st and November 1st
text: RYE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Gabelli Funds, LLC, will host the 46th Annual Auto Symposium at the Waldorf Astoria in Las Vegas beginning on October 31, 2022. This two-day symposium will feature presentations by senior management of leading automotive companies, with a lineup that runs the cradle-to-grave life within the automotive ecosystem. title: 3 Stocks to Buy When Consumer Confidence Is Down
text: Consumer confidence is a leading economic indicator and can forecast forward-looking economic performance. With consumer confidence recently hitting its lowest level in 16 months, that's not a great sign for the stock market.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy During a Recession
text: Looking to protect your portfolio? Then look no further than these three great businesses.

title: O'Reilly Automotive: Resilient Business In A Cyclical Industry
text: Although O'Reilly as specialty retailer does not appear like a wide economic moat company, it has stable margins, high growth rates, and impressive RoIC. In the past, the company could also withstand recessions extremely well and there still seems to be growth potential for the business - although growth rates might slow down.

title: This Automotive Stock Could Be Recession Insurance
text: O'Reilly has performed well in previous economic downturns and could do so again if a recession is currently in store for the U.S.
